title: Cars 2
description: Lightning McQueen and Mater travel the world for the World Grand Prix, where Mater becomes involved in an international spy mission.

title: Interstellar
description: A team of astronauts travels through a wormhole in search of a new home for humanity.

title: Pulp Fiction
description: Several interconnected crime stories unfold in Los Angeles.

title: Fight Club
description: An office worker and a charismatic soap salesman create an underground fight club.

title: It
description: A group of children face a terrifying shape-shifting entity that appears as a clown.

title: The Killing of John Lennon
description: A dramatization of the events leading up to the murder of John Lennon.

title: 127 Hours
description: The true story of a mountain climber trapped by a boulder in a remote canyon.

title: Back to the Future
description: A teenager accidentally travels to the past in a time machine built by an eccentric scientist.

title: Ice Age: The Meltdown
description: Manny, Sid, and Diego must escape a rapidly melting valley before it floods.
